audience_policies.source_phrase: Pick up coupon pass at the library. Patrons receive 50% off admission for up to 4 people. Patrons must purchase tickets online in advance at 7gables.org using LIBRARYPATRON promo code. Pass must accompany tickets.

coupon.source_phrase_block: Pick up coupon pass at the library. Patrons receive 50% off admission for up to 4 people. Patrons must purchase tickets online in advance at 7gables.org using LIBRARYPATRON promo code. Pass must accompany tickets.
